hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); upper=$(echo "$input" | tr "[:lower:]" "[:upper:]"); for pat in "DROP " "DROP\t" "TRUNCATE " "TRUNCATE\t" "ALTER TABLE" "CREATE TABLE" "GRANT " "GRANT\t" "REVOKE " "REVOKE\t"; do if echo "$upper" | grep -q "$pat"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive SQL command detected (matched: $pat). Use a migration script instead of raw DDL." >&2; exit 1; fi; done'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qiE "(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|sqlplus|SELECT |INSERT |UPDATE |DELETE )"; then mkdir -p workspace/logs; ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); echo "{\"event\": \"db_query_executed\", \"timestamp\": \"$ts\"}" >> workspace/logs/db-query-audit.log; echo "DB query logged at $ts"; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); ts=$(date +%s); mkdir -p workspace/logs; echo "{\"ts\": $ts, \"type\": \"PostToolUse\", \"tool\": \"$tool\"}" >> workspace/logs/activity-log.jsonl'
bash -c 'input=$(cat); ts=$(date +%s); mkdir -p workspace/logs; echo "{\"ts\": $ts, \"type\": \"SubagentStop\"}" >> workspace/logs/activity-log.jsonl'

bash -c 'python3 -c "import json,glob,os;s={};hf=\"pipeline/step-3-validate-fix/handoff.json\";s[\"handoff_step3\"]=json.load(open(hf)) if os.path.exists(hf) else {};qm=\"pipeline/step-4-report/output/query-matrix.json\";d=json.load(open(qm)) if os.path.exists(qm) else {};s[\"summary\"]=d.get(\"summary\",{});s[\"total\"]=d.get(\"total\",0);fails=[q[\"query_id\"]+\":\"+q.get(\"final_state\",\"\") for q in d.get(\"queries\",[]) if q.get(\"final_state\",\"\").startswith(\"FAIL_\")][:20];s[\"top_fails\"]=fails;pend=[q[\"query_id\"] for q in d.get(\"queries\",[]) if q.get(\"final_state\",\"\").startswith(\"NOT_TESTED\")][:10];s[\"top_pending\"]=pend;steps={};[steps.update({f\"step-{i}\":json.load(open(h)).get(\"status\",\"?\")}) for i in range(5) for h in glob.glob(f\"pipeline/step-{i}-*/handoff.json\")];s[\"steps\"]=steps;s[\"next_action\"]=\"gate_checks 확인\" if not s.get(\"handoff_step3\") else \"보고서 생성\" if s[\"handoff_step3\"].get(\"gate_checks\",{}).get(\"fix_loop_executed\",{}).get(\"status\")==\"pass\" else \"재위임\";json.dump(s,open(\"pipeline/supervisor-state.json\",\"w\"),indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)" 2>/dev/null; echo "[PreCompact] Supervisor state saved to pipeline/supervisor-state.json"'

bash -c 'echo "=== [PostCompact] 상태 복구 ==="; if [ -f pipeline/supervisor-state.json ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(open(\"pipeline/supervisor-state.json\"));print(f\"Total: {d.get(\\\"total\\\",0)}\");[print(f\"  {k}: {v}\") for k,v in d.get(\"summary\",{}).items() if v];print(f\"Steps: {d.get(\\\"steps\\\",{})}\");print(f\"Next: {d.get(\\\"next_action\\\",\\\"unknown\\\")}\")" 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f workspace/state-snapshot.json ]; then cat workspace/state-snapshot.json | python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(f\"Total: {d.get(\\\"total\\\",0)}\");print(f\"Next: {d.get(\\\"next_action\\\",\\\"unknown\\\")}\")" 2>/dev/null; else echo \"No state found\"; fi'

bash -c 'echo "=== OMA Pipeline Summary ==="; for i in 0 1 2 3 4; do h=$(ls pipeline/step-${i}-*/handoff.json 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$h" ]; then st=$(python3 -c "import json;print(json.load(open(\"$h\"))[\"status\"])" 2>/dev/null); echo "  Step $i: $st"; else echo "  Step $i: not started"; fi; done; qm=pipeline/step-4-report/output/query-matrix.json; if [ -f "$qm" ]; then python3 -c "import json;d=json.load(open(\"$qm\"));s=d.get(\"summary\",{});p=sum(v for k,v in s.items() if k.startswith(\"PASS_\"));f=sum(v for k,v in s.items() if k.startswith(\"FAIL_\"));n=sum(v for k,v in s.items() if k.startswith(\"NOT_\"));print(f\"PASS:{p} FAIL:{f} NOT_TESTED:{n}\")" 2>/dev/null; fi'
